name: QXG
description: Quad Stereo Gate — four-channel stereo low pass gate and mixer. 100% analog vactrol-free LPG circuit with voltage-controllable stereo spread. Designed to pair with PoliMATHS and MultiWAVE in the N.U.S.S.

controls.name: Control Combo Pots 1–4
controls.description: Panel controls for each LPG circuit. Attenuates signal at Control Input or normalled N.U.S.S. control signals. Acts as panel control when Control Input is unpatched.
controls.detail: CCW=closed · CW=open · Controls both amplitude and filter frequency

controls.name: XPREAD Panel Control
controls.description: Sets stereo spread for the four LPG channels. Noon=all centered. CW=Ch1 left→Ch4 right. CCW=reversed.
controls.detail: Noon=center · CW: Ch1=L, Ch2=wL, Ch3=wR, Ch4=R · CCW: reversed

controls.name: XPREAD CV Input attenuverter
controls.description: Bi-polar attenuator for XPREAD CV input.

controls.name: Vactrol Button
controls.description: Selects response mode: ON=Slow vactrol-emulating decay. OFF=Fast precision response with gentle LPG filtering.

inputs.name: Signal Inputs 1–4
inputs.description: Signal inputs for the four LPG circuits. Normalled to N.U.S.S. signal input header (MultiWAVE). Patching breaks normalling.

inputs.name: Control Inputs 1–4
inputs.description: CV inputs for the four LPG circuits. Normalled to N.U.S.S. control input header (PoliMATHS). Patching breaks normalling.

inputs.name: XPREAD CV
inputs.description: CV input for XPREAD stereo spread parameter.

inputs.name: Left (Mono) Aux Input
inputs.description: Stereo aux input L for chaining a second QXG or adding audio to mix. Mono use: patch to L only — appears at both mix outputs.

inputs.name: Right Aux Input
inputs.description: Stereo aux input R for chaining or adding audio to mix.

outputs.name: Channel Outputs 1–4
outputs.description: Individual LPG outputs. Patching an output removes that channel from the stereo Mix.

outputs.name: Left Mix Output
outputs.description: Stereo mix L of all channels and Aux inputs per control levels and XPREAD.

outputs.name: Right Mix Output
outputs.description: Stereo mix R of all channels and Aux inputs per control levels and XPREAD.

behaviors.name: Low Pass Gate
behaviors.trigger: CV → Control Input or Combo Pot
behaviors.description: CTRL parameter sets both amplitude and frequency of the passing signal simultaneously, giving classic LPG behavior. Analog, vactrol-free circuit.

behaviors.name: Vactrol Slow Mode
behaviors.description: Emulates the characteristic slow decay time of a vactrol optical element. Useful for plucked or natural decaying sounds.

behaviors.name: Fast Mode
behaviors.description: Fast precision response with gentle LPG filtering. Best for quickly-changing functions from PoliMATHS.

behaviors.name: Stereo Spread
behaviors.description: Routes all four channels across the stereo field. Individual channel outputs, when patched, remove that channel from the stereo Sum.

behaviors.name: N.U.S.S. Normalling
behaviors.description: Signal and Control input headers allow pre-patched connections from MultiWAVE (signal) and PoliMATHS (control) without front-panel cables.

patchIdeas.name: 8-voice N.U.S.S. stereo system
patchIdeas.patch: Two QXGs + PoliMATHS + MultiWAVE connected via headers · PoliMATHS outputs → QXG control inputs · MultiWAVE → QXG signal inputs
patchIdeas.diagram:
QXG:
* Vactrol: ON
* XPREAD: noon
- MultiWAVE (Channel 1–8 Outputs) -> QXG (Signal Inputs 1–4) // via header (voices 1-4)
- PoliMATHS (Channel Outputs 1–8) >> QXG (Control Inputs 1–4) // via header
- QXG (Left Mix Output) -> Output (L)
- QXG (Right Mix Output) -> Output (R)

patchIdeas.name: Mono channel in stereo spread
patchIdeas.patch: Patch a channel output → Left Aux input to hear it in mono while other channels spread
patchIdeas.diagram:
QXG:
* XPREAD: CW
- VCO (Out) -> QXG (Signal Inputs 1–4) // channel 1
- QXG (Channel Outputs 1–4) -> QXG (Left (Mono) Aux Input) // ch1 re-entered as mono centre
- QXG (Left Mix Output) -> Output (L)
- QXG (Right Mix Output) -> Output (R)

patchIdeas.name: CV-controlled stereo panning
patchIdeas.patch: LFO → XPREAD CV · XPREAD attenuverter to taste · all channels to mix outputs
patchIdeas.diagram:
QXG:
* XPREAD: noon
- LFO (Out) >> QXG (XPREAD CV) // animate stereo field
- VCOs (Out) -> QXG (Signal Inputs 1–4)
- QXG (Left Mix Output) -> Output (L)
- QXG (Right Mix Output) -> Output (R)
